name: CONTRACT-BUG-39
title: dispatch-feature-edit.py TDD_GAP prompt instructs subagents to name tests with .sh extension (violates Python-only stack Inv 11)
description: dispatch-feature-edit.py:87 contains the prompt template line 'Name the test after the bug id (e.g. test-{bug_id}-<description>.sh).' This contradicts Inv 11/17 (Python-only stack) and would lead any subagent following the prompt to scaffold .sh test files that immediately violate the contract. Fix: change the example extension from .sh to .py.
